#  About The Payment Processing Tab In The Payments Tool 
Table of Contents 
##  Set a Default Funding Account 
  1. Navigate to the Company level **Payments** tool.
  2. Click the **Payments Settings** ![Icons Settings Gear](https://images.ctfassets.net/plvbd9i6qkpm/8d4e4403c0eed73423d93c414c08e3a6/35b17d2e5497c876221891c1d9e5a114/icons-settings-gear.png?fm=webp&h=15) icon. This opens the Payments Settings page. The 'Business Entities' page in the 'Payments Processing' tab is active by default. This page lists the business entities configured to pay invoices in your company's Procore Pay software.
  3. Locate the business entity to modify and click its funding account(s) link. 
![Funding Account Link](https://images.ctfassets.net/plvbd9i6qkpm/d807fe2bda438595a836a4fb2ddf5930/27261816659839e1c0ca98512eb252ec/funding-account-link.png?fm=webp)
  4. Locate the account to modify.
  5. Click the **Overflow** menu and choose **Set as Default Funding Account**. 
![Set As Default Funding Account](https://images.ctfassets.net/plvbd9i6qkpm/ac66a4b98dab0cb332fb6c0f4d2308c5/d010cdaaa0565306c3047e49004cc05b/set-as-default-funding-account.png?fm=webp)
The account is marked _Default_ and moves to the top of the entity's Funding Accounts list. 
![Default Funding Account Marked](https://images.ctfassets.net/plvbd9i6qkpm/163f36f97e19220dc5ee4106e3111cef/d951b0f24ac8c30be74fff93b80f96dc/default-funding-account-marked.png?fm=webp)
#####  Tip
**Can I deactivate our default account at a later time?** No. The default account cannot be deactivated in Procore. Before you can deactivate an account, you must remove the default designation. See [Deactivate Funding Accounts as a Payor](https://v2.support.procore.com/process-guides/about-the-payment-processing-tab-in-the-payments-tool/deactivate-accounts).


[ ](https://v2.support.procore.com/process-guides/about-the-payment-processing-tab-in-the-payments-tool/edit-funding-accounts/)
[ Deactivate Accounts ](https://v2.support.procore.com/process-guides/about-the-payment-processing-tab-in-the-payments-tool/deactivate-accounts/)
title: About The Payment Processing Tab In The Payments Tool - Set a Default Funding Account
description: This guide details the subpages and controls in the Payment Processing tab under Payments Settings in the Company level Payments tool. | Set a Default Funding Account
